# kb-gateway — agent discovery

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): LLM instructions — tool routing, env, when NOT to use
- [docs/ENDPOINT-CATALOG.md](docs/ENDPOINT-CATALOG.md): **Endpoint cards — MCP + HTTP + corpus inventory (start here for full capacity)**
- [README.md](README.md): Human overview
- [docs/routing.md](docs/routing.md): Pinecone vs Neo4j vs router
- [docs/deployment.md](docs/deployment.md): Host for remote access
- [docs/client-setup.md](docs/client-setup.md): MCP client config
- [RUNBOOK.md](RUNBOOK.md): Ops + failure modes
- [09_Projects/kb-gateway/run/STATE.md](../09_Projects/kb-gateway/run/STATE.md): Gated project progress

MCP tools: `route_query`, `query_namespace`, `graph_query`, `list_namespaces`, `health`
